AL: Alabama: county health departments under Alabama Department of Public Health (alabamapublichealth.gov). Score: Pass/Fail. Search county environmental health offices.
AK: Alaska: Alaska Dept of Environmental Conservation (dec.alaska.gov/eh). Statewide. Score: Pass/Unsatisfactory/Fail.

AZ.description: Arizona: county environmental health departments conduct inspections (azdhs.gov). Score: typically 100-point or Pass/Fail.

Maricopa.portal_name: Maricopa County Environmental Services — Restaurant Search

Pinal.portal_name: Pinal County Environmental Health — Food Inspection Search

AR: Arkansas: Arkansas Dept of Health (healthy.arkansas.gov). Statewide. Score: Pass/Fail. Search healthy.arkansas.gov/programs-services/topics/food-protection.
CA: California: county environmental health departments. Many counties have online portals — San Diego (sdcounty.ca.gov), Sacramento (emd.saccounty.gov), Orange (ocfoodinfo.com), Alameda, Santa Clara, Fresno, Kern, Ventura, San Bernardino, Riverside. Score: 100-point or Pass/Fail depending on county.

CO.description: Colorado: CDPHE and county/city health departments (cdphe.colorado.gov/dehs/rf/inspections). Score: typically 100-point.

El Paso.portal_name: El Paso County Public Health — View Inspection Reports

Arapahoe.portal_name: Arapahoe County Public Health — HealthSpace Portal

Larimer.portal_name: Larimer County — Retail Food Establishment Inspections

Jefferson.portal_name: Jefferson County Public Health — HealthSpace Portal

CT: Connecticut: CT DPH (portal.ct.gov/dph). Local health departments conduct inspections. Green/Yellow/Red placard system in some towns. Priority (P), Priority Foundation (Pf), Core (C) violations. Check decadeonline.com for aggregated CT inspection data.
DE: Delaware: Delaware Division of Public Health — Office of Food Protection (dhss.delaware.gov/dph/hsp). Statewide. Score: 100-point with critical/non-critical violations.
DC: Washington DC: DC Health (dchealth.dc.gov). Food Protection Program conducts inspections. Score: Pass/Fail. Search at dchealth.dc.gov/service/food-safety.
FL: Florida: FL DBPR Division of Hotels & Restaurants (www2.myfloridalicense.com/hotels-restaurants/inspections/). Statewide. Score: Pass/Fail with violations reported.

GA.description: Georgia: GA Dept of Public Health (dph.georgia.gov/environmental-health/environmental-health-inspections). County health departments conduct inspections. Score: 100-point or letter grade in some counties. Note: Gwinnett/Newton/Rockdale are excluded from the statewide search.

Fulton.portal_name: Fulton County Board of Health — Food Service

Cobb & Douglas.portal_name: Cobb & Douglas Public Health — Inspection Scores

Coastal (Chatham).portal_name: Georgia Coastal Health District — Restaurant Inspections

HI: Hawaii: Hawaii Dept of Health (health.hawaii.gov). Statewide. Score: Pass/Conditional/Closed.
ID: Idaho: seven Public Health Districts conduct inspections (healthandwelfare.idaho.gov). Search via local health district website. Score: Pass/Fail.
IL: Illinois: Illinois Dept of Public Health (dph.illinois.gov). County/city health departments — Cook (chicago.gov), DuPage, Lake, Will, Kane, Sangamon. Score: 100-point or Pass/Fail depending on jurisdiction.
IN: Indiana: Indiana State Dept of Health (in.gov/isdh). County health departments conduct inspections. Score: Pass/Fail or 100-point.
IA: Iowa: Iowa Dept of Inspections & Appeals (dia.iowa.gov). Score: 100-point or Pass/Fail.
KS: Kansas: Kansas Dept of Agriculture (agriculture.ks.gov). Statewide. Score: Pass/Fail.
KY: Kentucky: Cabinet for Health & Family Services (chfs.ky.gov). County health departments conduct inspections. Score: Pass/Fail or 100-point.
LA: Louisiana: LA Dept of Health (ldh.la.gov). Parish-level inspections. Score: 100-point or Pass/Fail.
MA: Massachusetts: MA Dept of Public Health (mass.gov). Local boards of health conduct inspections — Boston, Suffolk, Middlesex, Worcester, Hampden, Norfolk, Essex. Score: Pass/Fail or 100-point depending on locality.
MD: Maryland: MD Dept of Health (health.maryland.gov). County health departments — Montgomery, Prince George's, Anne Arundel, Howard, Baltimore County/City. Score: Pass/Fail or 100-point depending on county.
ME: Maine: Maine CDC/DHHS (maine.gov/dhhs). County/local health departments. Score: Pass/Fail.

MI.description: Michigan: MI Dept of Agriculture & Rural Development (www2.mda.state.mi.us/MiSafe/Default). Statewide inspection search covers most counties. Score: 100-point or Pass/Fail.

Wayne.portal_name: Wayne County Environmental Health — Food Safety

Oakland.portal_name: Oakland County Health Division — Food Safety

Macomb.portal_name: Macomb County Health Department — Food Service Inspections

Kent.portal_name: Kent County Health Department — Inspection Reports

MN: Minnesota: MN Dept of Health (health.state.mn.us). County/city health departments conduct inspections. Score: Pass/Fail with risk categories.
MS: Mississippi: MS State Dept of Health (msdh.ms.gov). Statewide. Score: Pass/Fail. Search at msdh.ms.gov/foodfacilities.
MO: Missouri: MO Dept of Health & Senior Services (health.mo.gov). County/city health departments — St. Louis City/County, Jackson, Greene, Boone. Score: 100-point or Pass/Fail.
MT: Montana: MT DPHHS (dphhs.mt.gov). County health departments — Yellowstone, Cascade, Missoula, Gallatin. Score: Pass/Fail.
NE: Nebraska: NE DHHS (dhhs.ne.gov). County/city health departments — Douglas, Lancaster, Sarpy. Score: Pass/Fail or 100-point.
NV: Nevada: health districts — Southern NV Health District (snhd.info) for Clark County/Las Vegas, Washoe County (washoecounty.us/health) for Reno. Score: 100-point with letter grades in some districts.
NH: New Hampshire: NH DHHS (dhhs.nh.gov). City/town health officers conduct inspections. Score: Pass/Fail.

NJ.description: New Jersey: NJ Dept of Health (nj.gov/health/ceohs/phfpp/retailfood). County/local health departments conduct inspections. Score: 100-point or Pass/Fail.

NM: New Mexico: NM Environment Dept (env.nm.gov). Statewide. Score: Pass/Fail.
NY: New York: NY State Dept of Health (health.data.ny.gov). NYC DOHMH for 5 boroughs, county health departments for rest of state — Nassau, Suffolk, Westchester, Erie, Monroe, Albany, Onondaga. Score: 100-point or letter grade (NYC).

NC.description: North Carolina: county health departments conduct inspections (publichealth.nc.gov). Score: 100-point with letter grade (A/B/C).

Forsyth.portal_name: Forsyth County Environmental Health — Facility Search

Wake.portal_name: Wake County Environmental Health — Food & Lodging

ND: North Dakota: ND Health & Human Services (hhs.nd.gov). County/local health departments — Cass, Burleigh, Grand Forks. Score: Pass/Fail.

OH.description: Ohio: Ohio Dept of Agriculture and county health departments (odh.ohio.gov/find-local-health-districts). Score: 100-point or Pass/Fail.

Cuyahoga.portal_name: Cuyahoga County Board of Health — Food Safety

Franklin.portal_name: Franklin County Public Health — Food Safety

Summit.portal_name: Summit County Public Health — Food Protection

Montgomery.portal_name: Montgomery County Public Health — Food Safety

OK: Oklahoma: OK State Dept of Health (oklahoma.gov/health). County health departments — Oklahoma, Tulsa, Cleveland. Score: Pass/Fail or 100-point.

OR.description: Oregon: Oregon Health Authority (oregon.gov/oha/ph/healthyenvironments/foodsafety). County health departments conduct inspections. Score: 100-point (70=pass). Most Oregon counties publish inspection results on HealthSpace (inspections.myhealthdepartment.com). Inspections 1-2 times/year.

PA.description: Pennsylvania: PA Dept of Agriculture (pafoodsafety.pa.gov/Web/Inspection/PublicInspectionSearch.aspx). Statewide inspection search covers most counties. Score: Pass/Fail.

Philadelphia.portal_name: Philadelphia Office of Food Protection — Inspection Lookup

Allegheny.portal_name: Allegheny County Environmental Health — Citizen Access

RI: Rhode Island: RI Dept of Health (health.ri.gov). Statewide. Score: Pass/Fail with violations. Search at health.ri.gov.
SC: South Carolina: SC DHEC (scdhec.gov). Statewide. Score: 100-point with letter grade (A/B/C).
SD: South Dakota: SD Dept of Health (doh.sd.gov). County/local health departments — Minnehaha, Pennington. Score: Pass/Fail.
TN: Tennessee: TN Dept of Health (tn.gov/health). County health departments — Shelby, Davidson, Knox, Hamilton, Rutherford. Score: 100-point or Pass/Fail.
TX: Texas: TX Dept of State Health Services (dshs.texas.gov). County/city health departments — Harris/Houston, Dallas, Bexar/San Antonio, Tarrant/Fort Worth, Travis/Austin, El Paso, Nueces/Corpus Christi, Collin, Denton, Lubbock. Score: 100-point or Pass/Fail depending on jurisdiction.
UT: Utah: UT Dept of Agriculture & Food (ag.utah.gov). County health departments — Salt Lake, Utah, Davis, Weber, Washington. Score: Pass/Fail.
VT: Vermont: VT Dept of Health (healthvermont.gov). Statewide. Score: Pass/Fail.

VA.description: Virginia: VA Dept of Health (www.vdh.virginia.gov/data/environmental-health/food-establishments-inspections/). Statewide inspection search. Score: Pass/Fail with risk categories.

Fairfax.portal_name: Fairfax County Health Department — Food Inspection Reports

WA: Washington: WA State Dept of Health (doh.wa.gov). County health departments — King (kingcounty.gov), Pierce (tpchd.org), Snohomish, Spokane, Clark, Thurston, Kitsap, Whatcom, Benton, Yakima. Score varies by county — King County uses demerit/penalty points (lower=better), others use 100-point or Pass/Fail.
WV: West Virginia: WV Bureau for Public Health (dhhr.wv.gov). County health departments — Kanawha, Cabell, Monongalia. Score: Pass/Fail.
WI: Wisconsin: WI DATCP (datcp.wi.gov) and county health departments — Milwaukee, Dane, Waukesha, Brown, Racine. Score: 100-point or Pass/Fail.
WY: Wyoming: WY Dept of Agriculture (wyomingagriculture.gov). County health departments — Laramie, Natrona, Teton. Score: Pass/Fail.
